2605.30351.title: VideoMLA: Low-Rank Latent KV Cache for Minute-Scale Autoregressive Video Diffusion
2605.30351.paper_summary: Long-rollout causal video diffusion has converged on a fixed-size sliding-window KV cache, with recent progress innovating within this layout by changing which tokens occupy the window or how their positions are encoded. The per-head KV layout itself, a dominant contributor to streaming memory and latency, has been mostly left unchanged. In this paper, we present the first study of Multi-Head Latent Attention (MLA) in video diffusion. VideoMLA replaces per-head keys and values with a shared low-rank content latent and a shared decoupled 3D-RoPE positional key, reducing per-token KV memory by 92.7% at every cached layer. We further investigate why MLA succeeds in video diffusion even though the spectral assumption often used to motivate it in language models does not hold: pretrained video attention is not low-rank, with 99%-energy effective rank far above any practical latent dimension. VideoMLA retains quality at compression ratios where direct spectral approximation would predict large reconstruction error. We show that the MLA bottleneck, rather than the pretrained spectrum, determines the effective rank: both spectral and random initialization occupy nearly the full rank budget from initialization, and training preserves this budget while adapting within it. On VBench, VideoMLA matches short-horizon streaming video diffusion baselines, achieves the best overall score at long horizons among evaluated methods, and improves throughput by 1.23x on a single B200.
2605.30351.paper_summary_zh: 長期展開的因果視頻擴散已經收斂於固定大小的滑動窗口 KV 快取，最近的進展在這一佈局中創新，通過改變哪些標記佔據窗口或它們的位置如何編碼。每個頭的 KV 佈局本身，作為流媒體記憶和延遲的主要貢獻者，基本上保持不變。在本文中，我們首次研究了視頻擴散中的多頭潛在注意力（MLA）。VideoMLA 用共享的低秩內容潛在和共享的解耦 3D-RoPE 位置鍵替換每個頭的鍵和值，將每個標記的 KV 記憶在每個快取層減少 92.7%。我們進一步研究為何 MLA 在視頻擴散中成功，儘管在語言模型中常用來推動它的光譜假設並不成立：預訓練的視頻注意力並不是低秩的，其 99%-能量有效秩遠高於任何實際的潛在維度。VideoMLA 在壓縮比率下保持質量，而直接的光譜近似會預測出大的重建誤差。我們顯示，MLA 瓶頸，而不是預訓練的光譜，決定了有效秩：光譜和隨機初始化幾乎佔用了初始化時的全部秩預算，而訓練在適應過程中保留了這個預算。在 VBench 上，VideoMLA 與短期流媒體視頻擴散基準相匹配，在評估的方法中在長期範圍內達到最佳整體得分，並在單個 B200 上提高了 1.23 倍的吞吐量。
2605.30351.author: Hidir Yesiltepe et.al.
2605.30351.authors: Hidir Yesiltepe, Jiazhen Hu, Tuna Han Salih Meral, Adil Kaan Akan, Kaan Oktay, Hoda Eldardiry, Pinar Yanardag
